brand.font_stack: system sans-serif (Tailwind default: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto)
brand.tone: Helpful local expert; practical, reassuring, professional. No hype.

blog_storage.insertion: prepend new object to the blogs array
blog_storage.renderer: src/pages/BlogPost.tsx renders `content` via dangerouslySetInnerHTML inside Tailwind `prose prose-slate`

post_fields.title: string
post_fields.excerpt: 1-2 sentences; also used as meta description
post_fields.content: HTML string (this field holds the article body)
post_fields.author: enum
post_fields.image: absolute URL; requires alt text in the body hero
post_fields.keywords: comma-separated; emitted as hidden <meta name='keywords'>, not shown on page

image_strategy.mode: reuse existing asset library first, else generate

content_rules.service_area_mentions: primary_city + region required in intro and closing block
content_rules.keywords: hidden meta + woven naturally into body/title/excerpt

content_context.primary_source: client website — service pages + existing blog posts (read at generation time for full, accurate context)
content_context.note: Do NOT use the Client Directory 'Services Sold'/'Niche' fields for topic context — those describe what the agency sells the client, not the client's own customer-facing services. Directory is used only for business metadata (website, phone, location, Google Business URL).
